title: hieracium sylvaticum var. latifolium
intro: Hieracium sylvaticum var. latifolium, also known as the broad-leaved hawk's beard, is a variant of the Hieracium sylvaticum plant, a perennial herb that belongs to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The medicinal properties of Hieracium sylvaticum var. latifolium are attributed to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones, which have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Hieracium sylvaticum var. latifolium is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, with the tea being made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water.
